summary: Reviewed review_task_result flow for scope/policy checks and decision ordering; no code changes were required.
notes: The function enforces allowed/forbidden file checks and unexpected behavior/contract change checks before any escalation path.
If any violations are found, it returns REJECT with accumulated reasons, which aligns with strict policy enforcement.
When no violations exist, escalation is evaluated and can return ESCALATE with a human-decision reason; otherwise APPROVE is returned.
